user.title: Smart Presence Notify — General Settings
user.description: Configure how notifications are delivered based on who is home, and what happens when nobody is home.

data.name: Display name
data.target_mode: Who receives notifications when someone is home?
data.queue_mode: What to deliver when someone returns home?
data.fallback_mode: What to do when a queued notification expires?

data_description.name: The name shown in Home Assistant's Devices & Services page.
data_description.target_mode:
**Everyone home** — notification goes to all household members currently at home.
**Admin only** — only the designated admin receives it; if the admin is away, the first person home gets it.
**Caller decides** — you specify the recipients in each service call via the `targets` field.
data_description.queue_mode:
Applies when someone arrives home and there are queued notifications.
**All in order** — every queued notification is delivered one by one, oldest first.
**Last only** — only the most recent notification is delivered; older ones are discarded.
**Summary** — a single message listing all queued notification titles.
data_description.queue_timeout_minutes: Queued notifications older than this are automatically handled according to the expiry action below. Set to **0** to never expire.
data_description.fallback_mode:
**Discard** — expired notifications are silently deleted.
**Send to fallback service** — expired notifications are forwarded to the service specified below (e.g. a Telegram bot or email).
data_description.fallback_service: The notify service to use when a notification expires (e.g. `notify.telegram`). Required only when "Send to fallback service" is selected above.

persons.title: Person → Notify Service Mapping
persons.description:
For each person tracked in Home Assistant, select which notify service(s) to use. The **first service** in the list is the primary device; additional ones are used as fallbacks or extras depending on your notification app.

Leave a person empty to exclude them from Smart Presence Notify.

data_description.admin_person: The person who receives notifications when **Admin only** mode is active. If this person is not home, the first person who arrives home will receive the notification instead.

error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be 0 (disabled) or a positive number of minutes.
error.fallback_service_required: You must specify a fallback notify service when "Send to fallback service" is selected.
error.no_persons: At least one person must have a notify service assigned.
error.admin_required: You must select exactly one admin when "Admin only" mode is active.

abort.already_configured: Smart Presence Notify is already set up. Use the Configure button to change settings.
